name: PhishWise Email Scheduler

on:
  schedule:
    # Run every 6 hours \(0:00, 6:00, 12:00, 18:00 UTC\)
    - cron: '0 */6 * * *'
  
  # Allow manual trigger from Actions tab
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  send-simulations:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: Send Phishing Simulations
    
    steps:
      - name: Trigger production scheduler
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        run: |
          curl -X POST https://phishwise.vercel.app/api/scheduler/send-simulations \\
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.SCHEDULER_SECRET_PROD }}" \\
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
            -d '{}' \\
            --fail-with-body
      
      - name: Trigger staging scheduler
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/Pauls-Branch'
        run: |
          curl -X POST https://phishwise-pauls-branch.vercel.app/api/scheduler/send-simulations \\
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.SCHEDULER_SECRET_STAGING }}" \\
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
            -d '{}' \\
            --fail-with-body

      - name: Log scheduler run
        if: always\(\)
        run: echo "Scheduler triggered at $\(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC'\)"
EOF)

Bash(cat > "/c/Users/Ptribble/Desktop/Github Linked Projects/phishwise/.github/workflows/scheduler.yml" << 'EOF'
name: Phishing Simulation Scheduler

on:
  schedule:
    # Run every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday at 9:00 AM UTC
    - cron: '0 9 * * 1,3,5'
  # Also allow manual trigger via workflow_dispatch
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  send-simulations:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Send phishing simulations
        run: |
          curl -X POST \\
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
            -H "x-scheduler-secret: ${{ secrets.SCHEDULER_SECRET }}" \\
            "${{ secrets.NEXTAUTH_URL }}/api/admin/scheduler/send"
        env:
          SCHEDULER_SECRET: ${{ secrets.SCHEDULER_SECRET }}
          NEXTAUTH_URL: ${{ secrets.NEXTAUTH_URL }}
EOF)
